hero.headline: Ibihugu Bishya Biturutse Ku Muguda — Bitugejezeho
hero.subtitle: Uhuza n'abahinzi mu Uganda, Kenya, Tanzania, na Rwanda. Kuva mu murima muto w'aho waba ugereye kugera ku myuga minini — ShambaNi mugeza isoko ku muhinzi wese.

howItWorks.title: Byoroshye. Vuba. Byiza.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Umuhinzi wese yandikisha ibihugu binyuze kuri interineti cyangwa akamagara *220# kuri telefoni yose — nta telefoni y'ubwenge ikenewe. Andikisha ibihugu byawe mu misi mike, shyira igiciro, kandi ugere ku baguzi baba benshi.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Amashuri, amasosiyete, n'imiryango ireba ibihugu bishya kandi iha amabwiriza aturutse ku bahinzi. Shungura hakurikijwe akarere, icyiciro, cyangwa igiciro.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Umuhinzi aha ibihugu. Ishyura mu buryo bwa Airtel Money, MTN Mobile Money, PayPal, cyangwa Bank Transfer. Amafaranga y'ikigo ni 2.5% gusa — iyindi yahererekera umuhinzi.

ussd.title: Nta Telefoni Y'ubwenge? Ntakibazo!
ussd.description: Kanda *220# kuri telefoni yose wemeze ibihugu byawe, reba amabwiriza yawe, kandi wishyure — ndetse na telefoni yoroshye.
ussd.feature1: Andikisha ibihugu byawe mu misi mike
ussd.feature4: Bihari mu Cyongereza, Luganda, Kiswahili & Runyarwanda

crossBorder.title: Kuva mu Uganda Kugera mu Burasirazuba bwa Afurika
crossBorder.description: ShambaNi yatangiriye mu Uganda, ariko igitekerezo cyacu kigeza mu Burasirazuba bwa Afurika bwose. Twubakanya uhuza abahinzi n'abaguzi mu bihugu bine, tuvunagura imbogamizi n'ikoranabuhanga.

payments.title: Wishyura Uko Ushaka — Bya Ruguru
payments.airtelDesc: Ubworohere mu kohereza amafaranga muri Afurika y'Iburasirazuba yose. Buhari muri Uganda, Kenya, Tanzania, na Rwanda.
payments.mtnDesc: Urusobe rukuru rwa mobile money mu Rwanda na Uganda. Kohereza amafaranga vuba, nta konti ya banki isabwa.
payments.paypalDesc: Amahawa y'isi yose yakoreshejwe na PayPal. Ukoresheje: @LutwamaReagan. Umutekano w'umuguzi wahujwe.
payments.bankDesc: Ubworohere bw'ama banki yose mu bihugu by'Afurika y'Iburasirazuba.
payments.feeNotice: Amafaranga y'ikigo ni 2.5% gusa — makaba munini mu karere ka bose. Iyindi ihererekera abahinzi bacu.

testimonials.title: Inkuru Z'ukuri Ziturutse ku Bahinzi n'Abaguzi
testimonials.quote1: Mbere ya ShambaNi nari ncura kabaga zisigaye. Ubu ndacyohereza byose! Ukwezi gushize natsinze UGX 180,000 mu murima wange muto. Iyi nkuta yahinduye ubuzima bwanjye.
testimonials.quote2: Tugura inyanya na matooke biturutse ku bahinzi. Ibihugu bishya, ibiciro byiza, kandi tuzi neza aho biturutse. Abanyeshuri bacu bararya neza kubera ShambaNi.
testimonials.quote3: Nta telefoni y'ubwenge mfite ariko mpiga *220# nemeze ubunyobwa bwanjye. Nemeje amabwiriza 3 muri iyi cyumweru! Nta interineti, nshobora kohereza ibihugu byanjye.

cta.title: Witeguye Kwijira mu Isoko ry'Abahinzi b'Afurika y'Iburasirazuba?
cta.subtitle: Niba uri umuhinzi ushaka kugurisha cyangwa umuguzi ushaka ibihugu bishya — ShambaNi ibahuza.

footer.tagline: Gukomeza abahinzi b'Afurika y'Iburasirazuba — kuva ku murima muto kugera ku wukuru.

product.head: umutwe
product.deliveryInfo: Ihagase riri mu karere. Vugana n'umuhinzi kugira ngo uhuze.
product.farmerBio: Umuhinzi wiyemeje ufite uburambe bw'imyaka myinshi mu guhinga ibihugu byiza. Yiyemeje gukurikiza uburyo bw'ubuhinzi burambye kandi agerekeze ibihugu bishya kandi bifite ubuzima ku baguzi b'Afurika y'Iburasirazuba.

browse.title: Isoko ry'Ibihugu Bishya
browse.subtitle: Shakisha ibihugu bishya biturutse ku bahinzi bemejwe mu bihugu byose
browse.noResultsDesc: Gerageza kuhindura ishyakisha ryawe cyangwa imiturire kugira ngo ubone icyo ushaka.

cart.title: Igare Ryawe
cart.subtitle: Suzuma ibintu byawe mbere yo kwishyura
cart.emptyDescription: Shakisha isoko ryacu kugira ngo ubone ibihugu bishya biturutse ku bahinzi.
cart.airtelDesc: Wishyura ukoresheje Airtel Money. Uzamutse ubutumwa kuri telefoni yawe kugira ngo wemeze.
cart.mtnDesc: Wishyura ukoresheje MTN Mobile Money. Ukwemeza guhita kuboneka.
cart.paypalDesc: Wishyura mu buryo bwa PayPal. Ukoresheje: @LutwamaReagan
cart.bankDesc: Wishyura ukoresheje banki. Icyemezo gikenerwa nyuma yo kwishyura.
cart.paypalRedirect: Uzerekezwa kuri PayPal kugira ngo urangize kwishyura.
cart.terms: Nemeye amategeko kandiemeza ko amakuru yanjye arimo ari yo.
cart.successMessage: Murakoze ku agizo ryanyu! Umuhinzi yamenyeshejwe kandi azabavugana kugira ngo uhuze ihagase. Muzakira ubutumwa bwa SMS ku gihe cy'agizo ryanyu.

farmerRegister.title: Andikisha Uwugore Bwawe
farmerRegister.pageSubtitle: Tangira kugurisiza ivyawe ku baguzi benshi mu Burasirazuba bwa Afrika. Kwiyandikisha ni ubuntu kandi bitwara iminuti mike gusa.
farmerRegister.step4Desc: Genga amakuru yawe mbere yo kohereza
farmerRegister.phoneNote: Iyi numero izokoreshwa muri USSD no mu butumwa bw'ibihabwa
farmerRegister.languageNote: Iryo rizoba ururimi rwa USSD rwa kuvva
farmerRegister.farmAboutPlaceholder: Sobanura urugo rwawe, ibihuza, uburambe bwawe...
farmerRegister.paymentInfoNote: Amafaranga yose atunganywa na ShambaNi. Amafaranga arindwa neza kugeza igihe utanga yemejwe, maze akoherezwa kuri wowe kureba amafaranga 2.5% y'ikigo.
farmerRegister.successMessage: Murakoze kwiyandikisha muri ShambaNi. Itsinda ryacu rizogena gusaba kwawe no kugufata mu masaha 24-48. Mugihe kiriko, ushobora gutangira kuorodhesha ivyawe ukoresheje *220# kuri terefone yose.

admin.feeDescription: Aya mafranga akurwaho kuri buri gikorwa. Umuhinzi akira ayasigaye.
admin.paypalDescription: Izina rya PayPal rikoreshwa kwakira amafaranga y'isi yose.

ussdPage.heroDesc: Ntiwukeneye terefoni ngendanwa cyangwa interineti kugirango ugurisize kuri ShambaNi. Hamagara kode yoroshe kuri terefone yawe ya rusange utangire kugera ku baguzi mu Burasirazuba bwa Afrika.
ussdPage.step1Desc: Fungura telefoni yawe hanyuma winjize *220#. Hamagara. Nta porogarame yo kumanura ikenewe — ibi bikora kuri terefone yose, n'iya Nokia ya kera.
ussdPage.step2Desc: Urutonde roroshye ruraboneka ku kibuga cyawe. Hitamo icyo ushaka gukora: kohereza ibicuruzwa, reba amabwiriza, cyangwa reba amafaranga yawe. Koresha imbabare z'imimerere.
ussdPage.step3Desc: Umuguzi amara gutuma umubwiriza, uhabwa itangazo rya SMS. Kohereza ibicuruzwa, maze amafaranga akoherezwa muri Airtel Money, MTN Mobile Money, cyangwa konti ya banki.
ussdPage.smsMockup: Tegeko rishya! Umuguzi ashaka amagi matanu. Igiteranyo: UGX 57,500. Subiza THIBITISHA kwemera.
ussdPage.exploreDesc: Kanda ku bifunguro byo hepfo urebe ibishoboka ukora na USSD.
ussdPage.langDesc: USSD ya ShambaNi ikora mu ndimi 4 z'Afurika y'Iburasirazuba. Hindura igihe cyose mu gihe.
ussdPage.sms1Content: Tegeko rishya ryakiriwe! John M. ashaka kg 10 z'inyanya ku murima wawe. Subiza THIBITISHA kwemera cyangwa GHAINDA guhakanira. — ShambaNi
ussdPage.sms2Content: Amafaranga ya UGX 35,000 ku tegeko #1234 yoherejwe kuri Airtel Money yawe. Urakoze gukoresha ShambaNi!
ussdPage.sms3Content: Ibiciro by'iki cyumweru: Inyanya UGX 3,500/kg (↑5%), Amaji UGX 11,500/deri (→), Matooke UGX 15,000/riti (↓3%). Orodhesha ibicuruzwa byawe ubu!
ussdPage.faqA1: Amafaranga y'interineti ya rusange ya telefoni yawe akoreshwa (kenshi ni ubuntu cyangwa amafaranga make muri iyo minota). ShambaNi ntishaka amafaranga yose ku koresha *220#.
ussdPage.faqQ2: Ni telefoni zihe zikora na USSD?
ussdPage.faqA2: Terefone yose ifite umurongo w'ihamagara ikora — kuva kuri Nokia ya kera kugera kuri iPhone y'iki gihe. Nta interineti, nta porogarame, nta terefoni ngendanwa ikenewe. Niba ushobora guhamagara, washobora gukoresha ShambaNi.
ussdPage.faqQ3: Nakwishyura nte nta konti ya banki?
ussdPage.faqA3: Ushobora kwakira amafaranga ukoresheje Airtel Money cyangwa MTN Mobile Money kuri terefone yawe. Nta konti ya banki ikenewe. Amafaranga araza nk'amafaranga ya mobile kuri terefone yawe.
ussdPage.faqQ4: Nshobora guhindura ibiciro byanjye ukoresheje USSD?
ussdPage.faqA4: Yego! Hamagara *220#, hitamo 'Orodhesha Ibicuruzwa', hanyuma 'Hindura Ibiciro'. Ushobora guhindura ibiciro igihe cyose.
ussdPage.faqQ5: Namenya nte ko umuntu yategetse ibicuruzwa byanjye?
ussdPage.faqA5: Uzohabwa ubutumwa bwa SMS ako kanya umuguzi amaze gutuma umubwiriza. Ubutumwa burimo amakuru y'umuguzi, icyo ashaka, n'igiteranyo cyose.
ussdPage.faqA6: Byemewe. Turinda amakuru yose y'abahinzi bishingiye ku buryo bwo kubika ibanga. Nomero yawe ya terefone n'ingingo zo kwishyura ntizigera zisangira nabaguzi. Ibikorwa byose by'amafaranga bikorwa mu buryo bwizewe n'itsinda ryacu.
ussdPage.ctaDesc: Hamagara *220# ubu cyangwa kwiyandikisha kuri interineti kugera ku baguzi benshi mu Burasirazuba bwa Afrika.

aboutPage.heroTitle: Gushyigikira Abahinzi Bose mu Burasirazuba bwa Afrika
aboutPage.heroDesc: ShambaNi iriho kugirango igere ku masoko ya gihugu aja mu mijyi. Twizera ko umuhinzi wese — yaba afite terefoni ngendanwa cyangwa terefoni ya rusange — akwiye kugera ku isoko rikomeye.
aboutPage.storyPara1: Byatangiye no kureba: abahinzi baba muri miliyoni mu Burasirazuba bwa Afrika bahinga ibicuruzwa bikomeye, ariko benshi barakabiriza kubona abaguzi. Mu gihe cyacyo, abakoresha, amashuri, na resitora bashaka ibicuruzwa bishya, bidahambaye, vyahinwe hafi. Ikidaciye ku bwoko — ariko ni igihuza.
aboutPage.storyPara2: ShambaNi yakozwe kugira ngo ibe igihuza. Ariko twari tumenye ko gukora website gusa bitya. Abahinzi benshi badafite telefoni ngendanwa — bafite telefoni rusange zishobora guhamagara no kohereza ubutumwa gusa. Kubera ivyo twubake igendanwa rya USSD (*220#) rutuma umuhinzi wese yandika ibicuruzwa, arebe amabwiriza, akishyura akoresheje gusa agafepfo ka telefoni.
aboutPage.storyPara3: Uyu munsi, ShambaNi ikora muri Uganda, Kenya, Tanzania, na Rwanda — mu turere 200+, mu ndimi 4, ihura abahinzi n'abaguzi binyuze kuri web, terefone, na USSD. Amafaranga yacu y'ikigo ni 2.5% gusa, muri make muri ako karere, kuko twizera amafaranga agomba kugera ku bahinga ivyokurya.
aboutPage.pullQuote: Ikoranabuhanga rigomba kujya ku muhinzi. Si umuhinzi ajye ku ikoanabuhanga.
aboutPage.why1Desc: Igendanwa rya USSD (*220#) ruterere abahinzi badafite telefoni ngendanwa kwandika ibicuruzwa, kureba amabwiriza, no kwishyura. Nta interineti, nta porogarame, nta kigenga.
aboutPage.why2Desc: Kimwe mu makonti make muri ako karere. Twizera ko abahinzi bakwiye kubika ibyo bakora. Ibindi bijya muri make mu murima wabo.
aboutPage.why3Desc: Ikora mu bihugu 4 n'ururimi rw'aho mu gihugu. Turubaka isoko rikomeye rivuza abahinzi n'umuco wa gihugu.
aboutPage.paymentsDesc: Ubwishyu bwizewe butunganywa n'itsinda ryacu. Amahitagamiyo menshi kuri buri gihekane.
aboutPage.hiw1Desc: Umuhinzi wese ashobora kwandika binyuze kuri web cyangwa kupiga *220# kuri terefoni yose — nta telefoni ngendanwa ikenewe.
aboutPage.hiw2Desc: Amashuri, ubucuruzi, n'amazu areba ibicuruzwa bishya kandi ategeka amabwiriza muri abahinzi.
aboutPage.hiw3Desc: Umuhinzi ateganya itangwa. Ishyura mu buryo bwizewe ukoresheje Airtel Money, MTN Mobile Money, PayPal, cyangwa Banki.
aboutPage.visionText: Mu 2028, ShambaNi igamije guhuza abahinzi 10,000 mu Burasirazuba bwa Afrika, gukora miliyoni 5 z'amafaranga UGX mu migendekere, no kwagura mu turere twose tw'ubuhinzi muri ako karere. Tubona ejo hazira umuhinzi aguma inyuma kubera terefoni afite — aho USSD, web, na terefone zigenda zikorera hamwe kugirango isoko rikomeye ry'ubuhinzi mu Burasirazuba bwa Afrika rizubake.
aboutPage.founderQuote: Nakoreye ShambaNi kuko nabonye abo mu muryango wange bihanganira kugurisiza ivyabo. Mamawe yanjye yajyaga agenda amasaha menshi kugirango amfate umuguzi w'imineke ye, akagaruka nta kintu. Ikoranabuhanga rigomba gukora iki, atari uguhindura ibintu bikomeye. Ni yo mpamvu USSD iri mu mutima w'ibintu byose dukora.
aboutPage.ctaDesc: Niba uri umuhinzi witeguye kugurisiza cyangwa umuguzi uresha ibicuruzwa bishya — turi hano kuguhuza.
